2026-06-10.patch_summary: This patch adds a new configuration option, CONFIG_ACPI_NUMA_ADD_CFMWS_NODES, which allows the number of additional standby NUMA nodes to be reserved per CEDT CFMWS entry. This is useful for CXL drivers that want to place memory on distinct NUMA nodes within the same CXL Fixed Memory Window. The patch also updates the acpi_parse_cfmws function to request any standby nodes created after numa_emulation runs. The number of additional standby nodes to reserve can be set between 0 and 4, with a default value of 0.
